name: Charisma Check [Meesh]
description:
Your half-brother/step-brother/friend's hot girlfriend!


Geoff, your half-brother/step-brother/friend (you decide, man I dunno), throws a house party. His girlfriend, Clara, heads to the bathroom, and accidentally enters your room. You direct her to the bathroom, and after a bit, she bursts back into your room, catching you jacking your shit.

This is literally just the Charisma Check comic by Meesh. Check them out, they're kind of the goat.

Geoff is written as your step-brother by default, so feel free to be flexible with your race/species/whatever. If you want him to be something else, just specify in your first message, and add it to the chat memory.

I've minorly detailed the Capybara girl (Jasmine) and the Wildcat girl (Tiona), and greatly detailed Geoff (Maned Wolf) in this bot, so have fun. :)

[UPDATE]: Fleshed out Jasmine in line with the other bot I made, and slightly tweaked the intro message.



This bot is tested on Deepseek, but I'm sure any of the others are fine.

[art credit: Meesh]


This is my first bot, be kind! :3
creator: SleepingDog
